title: Faithful: PAEGaussianBlur param-response diverges from headless FCP (worst ddb 31.5 dB)
goal: FAITHFUL-REIMPL (ROADMAP Rule 13): the TS engine impl of PAEGaussianBlur must match REAL headless FCP across its ENTIRE parameter space, not just values the 65 fixed transitions use. The DELTA oracle (fct/faithful) set each continuous param of PAEGaussianBlur to range extremes across hosts ['Blurs__Gaussian', 'Lights__Bloom', 'Stylized__Center_Reveal', 'Stylized__Close_and_Open'] and compared how the oracle vs the engine RESPOND: ddb=PSNR(oracle(theta)-oracle(theta0), engine(theta)-engine(theta0)). worst ddb=31.53 < pass 40 means the engine responds WRONGLY to a real parameter change (a faithful engine scores ~99 dB; the identity/noise floor is 99). Fix the PAEGaussianBlur implementation so its parameter response matches FCP. NO scene-signature dispatch, NO env flags (Rule 12/13): behavior = f(filter params) only. Re-verify: `python3 -m fct.faithful.driver sweep PAEGaussianBlur` must reach >= pass_db worst-ddb across all hosts. Worst diverging (host/param/theta -> ddb): [{"host": "Blurs__Gaussian", "param": "vertical", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 6.759, "ddb": 31.534}, {"host": "Blurs__Gaussian", "param": "horizontal", "theta": 0.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 3.16, "ddb": 38.137}, {"host": "Stylized__Close_and_Open", "param": "amount", "theta": 100.0, "t": 0.35, "oracle_signal": 2.063, "ddb": 41.841}]
